title: MEDICAL TRANSPORTATION MANAGEMENT - 211info
text: UMPQUA HEALTH ALLIANCE MEDICAL TRANSPORTATION MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a ride service for health care visits covered by Oregon Health Plan (OHP) for Umpqua Health Alliance Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) members. Eligibility: OHP members assigned to Umpqua Health Alliance Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (877) 324-8109 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (877) 324-8109 TTY/TTD (541) 440-6304 Toll-free (888) 877-6304 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule a ride FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Insurance information AREA SERVED: Douglas County (excluding zip codes 97441, 97467, and 97473) Services: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
